- **Option A**: Peritoneal refers to the serosa lining abdominal cavities and certain pelvic organs.
- **Options B and C**, Intracellular and Extracellular, designate internal cellular environments and external spaces outside cells, respectively. Both are integral parts of defining body fluid compartments.
